metadata.title: Arena — World Cup Predictions
metadata.description: Challenge your friends with World Cup predictions: create leagues, guess the scores and climb the global leaderboard.

landing.description: Create your league, guess the exact match scores and climb the global leaderboard, taking on every registered player.

onboarding.title: Choose your favourite national team
onboarding.description: From every national team in the world. We use it to show your flag in the standings and among league members — it has no effect on your match predictions.

dashboard.missing: You have {count, plural, one {# prediction} other {# predictions}} to enter for today and tomorrow.
dashboard.allCaught: You're all caught up. Good luck!
dashboard.noMatchesBefore: No matches today or tomorrow. Predictions open the day before each match —

matches.title: Predictions
matches.notSynced: The calendar hasn't been synced yet. Run /api/sync and reload.
matches.noOpen: No matches are open for predictions right now.

matchDetail.notPredicted: You haven't predicted this match yet.
matchDetail.othersAppear: The predictions of your other league members will appear here once the match locks (5 minutes before kick-off).
matchDetail.noPredictions: No predictions to show. The predictions of your league members appear here.

leagues.title: Your leagues
leagues.subtitle: Create a league or request to join an existing one.
leagues.noneYet: You're not part of any league yet.
leagues.createDesc: You become the admin and get a code to share.
leagues.joinDesc: Enter the code you got from the admin.

leagueDetail.noAccess: You don't have access to this league yet. If you sent a request, wait for the admin's approval.
leagueDetail.shareText: Join my league «{name}» on Arena! Enter the code {code} in the Leagues section.

leaderboard.title: Global leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: All registered players, by total prediction points.

profile.statsHint: Your stats fill in as matches are played and scores are calculated.
profile.usernameHint: 3–24 characters: letters, numbers and underscore. Must be unique.
profile.remindersDesc: A daily nudge when you have predictions to enter.
profile.denied: Notifications are blocked in your browser. Enable them in the site settings to get reminders.
profile.unsupported: This browser doesn't support push notifications. On iPhone, add the app to your Home Screen first.

rules.title: How points are earned
rules.intro: When a match finishes, your prediction is compared with the real result.
rules.exactDesc: You guess both teams' goals (e.g. you predict 2-1 and it ends 2-1).
rules.signDesc: You get the outcome right — home win, draw or away win — but not the exact score.
rules.diffDesc: Your prediction's goal difference matches the real one (e.g. 2-1 counts like 3-2). It adds to the correct outcome.
rules.perMatchNote: An exact score is worth a full 5 points (it doesn't stack with anything else). Correct outcome and goal difference do stack: a maximum of 3 points without the exact score.
rules.bonusLastPlace: Among those who predicted that day, whoever scores the fewest points gets a 2-point consolation bonus.
rules.bonusTie: In case of a tie for last place, every tied player gets 1 point.
rules.bonusNote: The bonus requires at least two players who predicted and is only awarded once all the day's matches are finished. Players who don't play get no points. It applies inside leagues; the global leaderboard counts only pure prediction points, with no bonus.
rules.closeNote: Each match locks 5 minutes before kick-off. Until then you can enter or change your prediction freely; after that it's no longer possible.
